evals.prompt:
/tech-design --project audit-log

The PRD is at /Users/nwadhwa/prd-to-jira/.claude/skills/tech-design/evals/files/audit-log-scoped-prd.md. Copy it to docs/projects/audit-log/prd.md before running. Work in /Users/nwadhwa/prd-to-jira as the project root. When asked which repos to scan, use acme/workflow-engine.
evals.expected_output: A tech-design.md at docs/projects/audit-log/tech-design.md with API contracts tagged [EA] or [GA], a DB schema section with the audit_events table, a repos-scanned comment block, status: draft frontmatter, and Open Technical Questions section. EA and GA work clearly separated.
expectations: Every API endpoint in the API Contracts section is tagged with either [EA] or [GA]
Each API endpoint documents at minimum: HTTP method + path, auth requirement, request parameters, and at least one response code with shape
A Database Schema section is present with at least one table or schema change defined
An Open Technical Questions section is present
A repos-scanned HTML comment block is present in the document (format: <!-- repos-scanned: [...] -->)
The output file has status: draft in its YAML frontmatter
EA-scoped work is not duplicated in the GA section

evals.prompt:
/tech-design --project rule-editor-history

The PRD is at /Users/nwadhwa/prd-to-jira/.claude/skills/tech-design/evals/files/ux-only-scoped-prd.md. Copy it to docs/projects/rule-editor-history/prd.md before running. Work in /Users/nwadhwa/prd-to-jira as the project root. This is a UI-only feature with no backend changes — confirm before proceeding.
evals.expected_output: For a UI-only feature, the skill should either produce a minimal tech-design.md stub noting no backend changes, or explicitly confirm with the user that no API/DB/backend work is required. The output should not invent API contracts or DB schema that don't exist.
expectations: The skill identifies this as a UI-only feature with no new backend endpoints or DB schema changes
No fabricated API endpoints are documented (the only API usage is reading from an existing internal endpoint)
No new DB schema changes are documented (the PRD explicitly states no DB changes required)
The output file has status: draft in its YAML frontmatter
A Components section describes the new UI component and its relationship to the existing rule editor
